```json
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T20:15:32.382+00:00",
        "height": 464,
        "width": 900,
        "storage_key": "61e274a4-cbd1-4335-b173-d7fbe808c854",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "61e274a4-cbd1-4335-b173-d7fbe808c854",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can now preview Live Link data in the editor viewport without needing to prepare any actors or skeletal meshes. The <b>Live Link Data Preview</b> actor visualizes all your Animation, Transform, Camera, and Marker role data in one convenient actor.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We also provided actor components for custom editor utility tooling. <b>Mocap Manager</b> uses these to visualize your Live Link data.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Live Link Hub — Robust Recording",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138733,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Live Link Hub Robust Recording",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138733,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 1533234,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T20:14:32.034+00:00",
        "height": 761,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "6096ec0e-933c-4942-9afb-8d52f197911c",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "6096ec0e-933c-4942-9afb-8d52f197911c",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We improved recording robustness in Live Link Hub to cope with subject data changing size over time — for example when losing a subject's tracking then recovering it during a recording.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can upgrade recordings from previous versions to the new format using a right-click menu option in the recording list.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Live Link — Broadcast Component",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138743,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Live Link Broadcast Component",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138743,
        "file_name": "live-link-broadcast-component.gif",
        "file_size": 2849893,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:33:21.707+00:00",
        "height": 600,
        "width": 1304,
        "storage_key": "64897646-c86a-4d8b-8784-ff8783b9daef",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "64897646-c86a-4d8b-8784-ff8783b9daef",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can add the new <b>Live Link Broadcast</b> <b>component </b>to actors in your level and turn them into Live Link subjects for other machines on the local network to receive animation from. The Broadcast component supports the Transform, Camera, and Animation roles.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This new component enables workflows where you can use a lightweight Unreal Engine project for skeletal retargeting, then you can broadcast the resulting retarget pose to other Unreal Editor projects on the network, making UE the retarget DCC software. The framerate of the broadcast animation is equal to the game thread framerate.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Live Link — Pauseable Data Stream",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138745,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Live Link Pauseable Data Stream",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138745,
        "file_name": "image65.gif",
        "file_size": 2581317,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:35:48.188+00:00",
        "height": 610,
        "width": 1101,
        "storage_key": "8cebc6c8-cb01-4383-a0d1-860286a36735",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "8cebc6c8-cb01-4383-a0d1-860286a36735",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can now pause and unpause data from Live Link subjects in the Live Link panel and in Live Link Hub. You can pause subjects individually or in groups.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "There are also Blueprint scripting functions to control pausing from your custom editor tooling. Mocap Manager now uses this API to control pausing of subjects.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Live Link Hub — Unreal Editor Device",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138746,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Live Link Hub Unreal Editor Device",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138746,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 129103,
        "content_type": "image/jpeg",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:37:09.554+00:00",
        "height": 602,
        "width": 1000,
        "storage_key": "c819bc70-598a-4992-8611-86641306bcb7",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "c819bc70-598a-4992-8611-86641306bcb7",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "In future releases, the recording device functionality of Switchboard will be migrated to Live Link Hub for multi-user motion capture setups. For UE 5.7, in Live Link Hub you can now control the slate and record stop-start of Take Recorder on connected Unreal Editor clients, using a new plugin called <b>Live Link Unreal Device</b>, which is experimental.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This new approach improves robustness of multi-client Take Recording, replacing the legacy OSC message system used by Switchboard, and provides user-controlled authority over what each client should record and which clients should be allowed to record.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Mocap Manager — Dynamic Prop Attachment",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138747,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Mocap Manager Dynamic Prop Attachment",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138747,
        "file_name": "mocap-manager-dynamic-prop.gif",
        "file_size": 2806871,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:44:27.567+00:00",
        "height": 547,
        "width": 1261,
        "storage_key": "3a6fdb59-c9d3-40ab-a785-37b7870241a1",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "3a6fdb59-c9d3-40ab-a785-37b7870241a1",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "When retargeting mocap there are often offsets between a performer's hands and the hands of your mocap character. This presents a problem when attempting to align tracked props with your character.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The new <b>Dynamic prop attachment</b> component provides a way for you to drive a prop with motion capture data but add a dynamic offset to keep it in your character's hands.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The <b>PCapProp</b> component now has a Blueprint-overridable function to let users write their own dynamic attachment logic. An example implementation is provided in Mocap Manager that should work for a majority of single handed props.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Mocap Manager — Improved Performer Mesh Creation",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138748,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Mocap Manager Improved Performer Mesh Creation",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138748,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 441986,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:45:30.150+00:00",
        "height": 545,
        "width": 1140,
        "storage_key": "e4038d1c-81f1-4ca3-ad49-c23574750c98",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "e4038d1c-81f1-4ca3-ad49-c23574750c98",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "For the most accurate retarget result a skeletal mesh scaled to the proportions of the performer's Live Link data is considered best-practice.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We improved the workflow in Mocap Manager for creating this asset to work with stages where the stage origin may not be conveniently placed and for systems that use right-handed coordinate systems.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Composure",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138749,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Composure",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138749,
        "file_name": "composure.gif",
        "file_size": 3069575,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:47:06.272+00:00",
        "height": 555,
        "width": 1280,
        "storage_key": "13655506-c53e-4975-a882-ef5767f8eb0d",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "13655506-c53e-4975-a882-ef5767f8eb0d",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Unreal Engine 5.7 reintroduces <b>Composure </b>as a modern system for real-time compositing with both live video input as well as file/image media plates. The new Composure is a layer-based tool with numerous improvements over the legacy system, including:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "A redesigned <b>User Experience</b> and streamlined workflow.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Performant <b>Shadow </b>and <b>Reflection </b>integration for live-action footage using <b>Custom Render Passes</b>.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "An improved <b>Keyer</b>.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Media Profile",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138751,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Media Profile",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138751,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 591487,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:48:11.104+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "0b4ee201-36ab-4e7d-915a-f1d968a7177a",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "0b4ee201-36ab-4e7d-915a-f1d968a7177a",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Historically, the management of live video input and output in Unreal Engine required multiple assets (Media Source, Media Player, Media Texture, and so on) to get from point A to point B. The <b>Media Profile</b> seeks to consolidate these into a single configuration asset for a given machine setup and provide numerous workflow enhancements, such as:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dynamically add multiple Media Sources and Media Outputs and select the desired hardware option (for example, AJA, Blackmagic, NDI).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Simultaneously preview multiple IO feeds.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Capture Media Output.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Configure Timecode and Genlock with immediate feedback.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Conveniently access video IO functionality in related tools such as Composure with a single click.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Take Recorder — Hitch Protection (Experimental)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138750,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Take Recorder Hitch Protection (Experimental)",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138750,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 138816,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:48:10.846+00:00",
        "height": 466,
        "width": 1300,
        "storage_key": "88ee631c-ee71-4a4f-beb0-90bd77005c69",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "88ee631c-ee71-4a4f-beb0-90bd77005c69",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The UE 5.7 update adds support for <b>hitch protection</b> during take recording. You can now configure Take Recorder to dilate the recording speed to protect against data loss. If a frame would otherwise be dropped, Take Recorder can adjust the engine evaluation to allow time for the data to be recorded before catching up.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "More reliably record complete data.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Visualize areas of concern where data integrity might be lost.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Make informed decisions in the moment about the quality of your recordings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Naming Tokens — Editable Text Widget",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138753,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Naming Tokens Editable Text Widget",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138753,
        "file_name": "image87.gif",
        "file_size": 21142,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:51:53.545+00:00",
        "height": 236,
        "width": 642,
        "storage_key": "c61648cc-ace8-4f78-afd9-b3b631fbdd90",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "c61648cc-ace8-4f78-afd9-b3b631fbdd90",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We added a new slate and UMG <b>Naming Tokens Editable Text</b> widget with direct support for naming tokens. You can now easily build pipeline tools with naming tokens support. When focused, the text box will display the unevaluated {token} string. When committed, the text box will show the evaluated result text.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Search and autocomplete {tokens} directly from the text box",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Immediately see the evaluated token value directly in the text box",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Available with the <b>Naming Tokens</b> plugin.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Timeline Templates for Cinematic Assembly Schemas",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138754,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Timeline Templates for Cinematic Assembly Schemas",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138754,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 128287,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:52:34.067+00:00",
        "height": 624,
        "width": 996,
        "storage_key": "3cb81a9f-533d-413b-af65-918e2db9fbc2",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "3cb81a9f-533d-413b-af65-918e2db9fbc2",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Cinematic assembly schemas</b> can now reference existing level sequences and cinematic assemblies as templates for the sequencer timeline. You can specify a target template and have that timeline recreated every time you create a new cinematic assembly using the schema.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Design your base timeline in advance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduce repetition and error when creating shots, scenes, lighting sequences, and more!",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Available when using the <b>Cinematic Assembly Tools (CAT)</b> plugin.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Duplicate Assemblies with Reference Replacement",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138756,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Duplicate Assemblies with Reference Replacement",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138756,
        "file_name": "image46.gif",
        "file_size": 391542,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:53:35.399+00:00",
        "height": 275,
        "width": 800,
        "storage_key": "e7058df9-1cad-43f8-8243-f42e3d09b6a2",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "e7058df9-1cad-43f8-8243-f42e3d09b6a2",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can now duplicate assemblies to a new location with reference replacement. You no longer need to manually create, rename, and re-reference subsequences when duplicating an assembly.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Duplicate to a new location and rename automatically based on assembly metadata and tokens.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Subsequences are procedurally duplicated, renamed, and re-referenced to ensure no references are left behind, changing all of your old shots.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Accessible easily from a clean and simple wizard.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "SMPTE 2110&nbsp;—&nbsp;Nvidia Rivermax BlueField-3 Support",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26138757,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "SMPTE 2110 Nvidia Rivermax BlueField-3 Support",
      "image": {
        "id": 26138757,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 364033,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-10T21:54:19.535+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "7274259f-f01b-4948-95db-dd7b8ccb9124",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "7274259f-f01b-4948-95db-dd7b8ccb9124",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The Nvidia Rivermax plugin in Unreal Engine 5.7 supports both BlueField-2 and BlueField-3 DPUs with validated functionality in nDisplay for In-Camera VFX.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "k1Vl",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}
```

```json
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "UE has been updated to use Gradle 8.7, and the Android Gradle Plugin (AGP) version we use has been updated to version 8.5.2. If you are using Android Studio for debugging, we recommend using Android Studio Koala. Ladybug also works, but does not update Gradle or AGP from the above versions.",

                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "When you choose your NDK level, you should target android-26, which supports Android 8.0+.",

                        }

                  "content": "4.0",

                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "OpenXR",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "1.1.46",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "OpenXR 1.0 and 1.1 runtimes are supported, either can be disabled in project settings.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }

            "settings": {

}
```

## Release Notes

```json
{
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2533,

  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",

      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Neural Network Engine (NNE)",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added multi-task support to the IREE CPU backed NNE runtime.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Upgraded IREE to version 3.5.0. for NNE plugin NNERuntimeIREE.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Animation",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Animating in Engine",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a 'Tolerance' To the ControlRigPoseMirrorSettings Project settings that is used to match Controls also by position in rest pose. We still match by the Mirror table first, and fallback to position based matching. We also now cache the tables and reset them if a mirror table property is changed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved Anim Details",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "UX Editing multiple values no longer displays the first property value.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Releasing focus on multiple values no longer sets the first property value.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Shift clicking to the left of a property name no longer resets the property.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for math expressions with multiple operators.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed support for =operator syntax, instead use operator =, e.g *=3 to multiply the current value by 3.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer show parent controls of the current selection, avoiding showing too many channels when a selected control has hosted channels.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now follows the same order as Sequencer for non Control Rig properties",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now uses meta data of Control Rig elements and Object Properties that sequencer controls, value ranges are now displayed and respected.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Selected Anim Details properties now navigate to their value widget when pressing tab.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Animator Kit:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new Locator utility rig.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Adding static mesh locators and materials.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Curve Editor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The Set Start Playback Range and Set End Playback Range shortcuts now work in the Curve Editor as well as Sequencer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "A new preference, Panning Mouse Button, allows you to choose whether right or alt-middle mouse button, or both should be used for panning the curve editor view. Also, alt-right now always zooms in/out.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The Next Key and Previous Key shortcuts now work in the Curve Editor as well as Sequencer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured we load an animation instead of trying to just find the package before we \"Bake To Animation\" so that it doesn't try to create a new asset. ",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated AnimationEditorUtils.cpp",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deleting a Bool channel can no longer set the key at another time if AutoKey and KeyAll is on.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer adds anim layers to level sequence unless needed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Constraints now work with Pivot Tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed shift click so it always goes to the last selected object, added a hot key to toggle pivot and motion trail modes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure to automate tangents when baking.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made motion trails enter/exiting undo/redoable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Motion trails can be selected without a focused viewport.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure Rotator/Location/Scale controls have a curve color",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Pose library can paste onto hidden control rigs",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the AnimSequencerExport Blueprint type",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim Details:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Properties now reset their values to the initial value of controls when clicking reset to default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now also displays properties that reside within a Shot Track.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed navigation not working in some cases.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue in Anim Details where selecting a component in a plain location, rotation or scale control would not select the control in Curve Editor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer shows objects if keys are selected only.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed property value widgets are losing focus while scrubbing if a blueprint actor is controlled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed in some cases editing Anim Details properties creates more than one undo step.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed Anim Details options no longer showing when reentering animation mode",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where Anim Details displayed the actor or component name instead of the track name for attributes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Curve Editor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issues where bezier curves were not always painted correctly.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where curves were not painted when none of its keys were visible.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where linear pre-/post-infinity extrapolation was not always painted correctly",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Baking keys with a value different than 1 would increase range",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where pre-/post-infinity was not painted correctly when the first or last key's tangent mode was linear and pre-/post-infinity interpolation was linear",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fix an issue where curves flicker hovered and unhovered while editing",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Motion Trails:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made sure the Motion trail state stays on with asset reload.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed strobing frame coloring with dashed by setting the start frame to be eval range start so it doesn't change when view range changes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed crash when drawing HUD since trail may not be updated due to how the hud draws. Clean pin state in UI when using modifiers.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where changing additive animation modes with root motion on causes inconsistent root position when going from an additive mode to none.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug where starting an animation with a non-zero playback time (like rewind debugger can do) would cause an incorrect root position.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When merging sections no longer see if it's in range, just extend it so we can match up how it works without the merge.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now only compensate from the game thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now set or add keys when recording control rig keys, previously we would just add keys causing duplicates.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim Layers:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Bake Fix for absolute with additives when doing per frame bakes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Make Name Column not shrink when shrinking",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Layers show up when added to sub sequence",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Keep track of open anim layer UI on the anim layer asset data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed duplicate/merging control rig sections when the channel layout is different between sections.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made generic vector channel data display more robust for position/rotation/scale control types. This also fixes the euler curve filter not recognizing rotation keys coming from Rotator control types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Sequencer: When baking to control rig, the animation track is now disabled instead of the individual sections.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Turn off throttle when mouse button is pressed not just on drag so scrub time doesn't throttle in sequencer/curve editor",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Space Switching: Remove extra keys when clicking a space key by checking to see if we are changing into the same space in which case we can delete the extra key and the space key",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Hosted channels are no longer enabled if the parent is not enabled, this breaks selection. Also fixed anim layer selection with static meshes",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Sequencer: The scrub shortcut (b) now properly works in the viewport, Sequencer and Curve Editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix Pivot square scale in different FOV's.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Force LOD to 1 when ticking skel meshes when baking anim sequences. Sequencer may restore state which can change the lod during the bake process.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Pivot Tool: Pivot render works in different FOVs",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Animation Kit:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added aim option for blendParent. Changed control shapes to not be solid.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixing bad root attachment when no control rig exists.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue with the recompute mesh normals kernel used by Deformer Rigs in the Animator Kit plugin causing unexpected changes to mesh normals even if they are not influenced by deformer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can no longer do space compensation from nongame thread which can happen when deleting many channels, in which case we probably don't want to compensate anyway",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Pose Library fixes, use alt drag for non additive drags and for additive it goes from -1 to 2.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Blending and additive mode are now working on mirror.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Space Switching: Fix for undoing space switch key deletion.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Tools such as snapper, trails and baking now work better with spawnables in nested subsequences",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Character Customization (Mutable)",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added component naming support for spawned groom components.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Debugger improvements:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [

                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for Dataless parameters.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Unified Debugger and Editor compilation options.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Reordered some widgets for better use of the available space.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Minor API improvements:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Actor:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added ACustomizableSkeletalMeshActor::GetCustomizableObjectInstance.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added ACustomizableSkeletalMeshActor::GetSkeletalMeshComponent.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Override Materials",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Deprecated UCustomizableObjectInstance::GetOverrideMaterials(int32).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added UCustomizableObjectInstance::GetSkeletalMeshComponentOverrideMaterials(FName).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Restricted Passthrough Mesh Component to only support Skeletal Meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Material Parameter assert.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Default Values not exposed to Blueprint.",
            "settings": {

            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Skeletal Mesh Parameter morph check.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UpdateSkeletalMeshAsync missing parameters.",
            "settings": {

            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Materials comparison for merging.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Textures and Meshes not being properly cached, their hash was not deterministic.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a compiled API typo.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed multiple Dataless bugs:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",

                    "is_hidden": false

                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",

                  "settings": {

                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fix Texture Parameter not cropping images with layout operations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issues with GenerateMutableSourceImage cache.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing COI Contains API functions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed public API Enum Parameter functions not working with the first parameter.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetEnumParameterNumValues",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetEnumParameterValue",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed deadlock when saving an asset + compiling a CO while asset registry was loading.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed streaming crash when no indices.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed meshes incorrectly reusing poses.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed deprecated 5.6 API functions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Control Rig",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Update default hotkeys and related functionality:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Solve Mode: Construction Event - 1",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Solve Mode: Forwards Solve - 2",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Solve Mode: Backwards Solve - 3",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Solve Mode: Backwards and Forwards - 4",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Next Solve Mode - M",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Enable profiling- P",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Show Controls as Overlay - U",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Display Nulls - G",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Display Socket - H",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Display Axes for selection - J",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Using hotkey for Profiling (P by default) now creates an undo step.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Function nodes from other assets now show the asset name instead of the asset path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Flagged Render MorphTarget MaxBlendWeight CVar as safe for render thread, in order to avoid some warning logs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the animation show flags of the control rig editor never clip off of the viewport toolbar.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed duplicated Control Rig assets not resetting the asset variant ID.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Control Rig Hierarchy no longer reserves transform space for non transform elements (curves and connectors).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Control Rig Physics",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved to its own experimental plugin, though it still requires the Physics Control plugin as well.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added ability to import collision shapes and bones",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Support for \"wind turbulence\"",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Support for colliding against world objects",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Add various cvars under controlrig.physics",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Numerous improvements, especially access to functionality, and fixes",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed top level component concept from Control Rig Hierarchy",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added GetSocketTransform",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modular Control Rig:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Adding plugin Icon for Modules",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved backwards solve for Foot Module.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Module tags and Root56 module to the correct ini files.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dragging a rig element onto the graph now offers an option to Get Metadata and Set Metadata.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Update default settings and remember them per editor per user:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Display Axes On Selection is now enabled by default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Display Axes On Selection, Axis Scale, Display Nulls, Display Sockets, Gizmo Scale, Hide Control Shapes, Show Controls as Overlays, Only Select Rig Controls are now saved per editor per user.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Control Rig now only performs one copy of the hierarchy during initialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added line trace unit nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added icon to plugin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Damp and Critical Spring Damp nodes to Control Rig.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Control Rig menu now shows directly in the viewport toolbar instead of being a submenu in the Show menu (eyeball icon).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nodes and hierarchy elements now offers options to find nodes by name locally and globally.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updates to Set Initial Transform from Current and related Commands",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Initial Transform from Current is now only applicable for Bones, Nulls and Connectors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For Controls, Set Initial Transform from Current is now Zero Controls.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For Controls, Set Initial Transform from Closest Bone is now Zero Controls from Closest Bone, and no longer applicable for Bones, Nulls and Connectors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Shape Transform from Current is now Zero Control Shape.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved findItemsWithTag to the construction event for performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Control Rig curve container undo / redo breaking the curve list",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Control Rig editor resetting on compile curve operations made on the curve container (delete, rename, and import).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in Control Rig Pose adapter when removing bones from the skeleton while having a Blueprint with a Control rig opened in the asset editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed AnimNode Control Rig variable mappings initialization at OnInitializeAnimInstance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Control Rig: Need to update Rotation Order table with modular rig updated names.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Control Rig Hierarchy updating more transforms than needed in propagate dirty flags function.",
```
