            "content": "Removed calling Modify from SetPreRollFrames / SetPostRollFrames. The caller should be responsible for calling Modfiy().",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "If you copy an event track from one sequence to another, the events in the pasted event track will point back to the blueprint director in the copied sequence. This is not allowed, so those events are now cleared.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed creating an object property track as a class property in python not properly setting the bClassProperty value which allows a class chooser to pop up instead of an object chooser.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed keys not selectable on multiple rows.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Restored a section model expansion state to be closed if it was before, since RestoreLayout resets it to expanded.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now tear down the Take Recorder's Sequencer instance before we delete and GC the sequence.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Re-added dropped support for Blocking Evaluation in UMG animations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when reinitializing a Sequencer editor on a new sequence while the previous one had legacy tracks",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When importing cameras, now applies a uniform scale modifier to distance based parameters (Manual Focus Distance).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer blends enum values, and make the byte track use the enum system when it animates an enum.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured that evaluation context buffers are flipped if an eval task is active prior to forced update.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a potential fix for a memory corruption of UMG animation states.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The topmost unmuted Cinematic Shot is now correctly evaluated.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Previously, if a muted Cinematic Shot was topmost, it wouldn't be skipped over.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed some properties that should appear to be animatable (i.e. FieldOfView and AspectRatio for Cine Camera Components).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue that when converting to a spawnable, sometimes the original possessable meshes were still visible.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed undo of camera cut section now restoring the camera binding properly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed regression of pre/post-roll behavior in the skeletal animation track.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Creating the initial key for material tracks now respects the default interpolation type setting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Snap play time to pressed/dragged key only if snapping is enabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a reference-leak in the Track Instance system.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Setting the time of a key through the Properties menu now works properly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Keying specific channels of a transform through the Details Panel now properly sets the key with those current values (and not 0).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed calls to bool property custom accessors, which were using the wrong function signature.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Better handling looping for camera cut tracks:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new \"HasLooped\" flag on the evaluation context.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Assumes by default that looping sequences are \"seamless\" and do not create a straight/hard camera cut on loops.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an advanced evaluation flag to opt out of this assumption.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed undo not working when editing with control rigs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now fully supports all camera and post-process properties when previewing blending camera cuts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled ensure before cleaning up camera cut track viewport modifiers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed regression in how skeletal animation sections behave when resized from the left edge.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Take the first loop start offset into account when determining if a skeletal animation section needs to loop.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated FMovieSceneBinding::Name since it's redundant and not kept in sync with actor labels.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now return multiple objects with FMovieSceneBindingResolveResult. FMovieSceneBindingResolveResult's Object is deprecated in favor of an array of Objects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Migrated text tracks to Movie Scene Tracks plugin (enabled by default). Deprecated MovieSceneTextTrack plugin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Skeletal Editing",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Skin weight profiles can now be switched directly in the skeletal editor viewport, if there are skin weight profiles defined for the skeletal mesh asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Edit Weights Tool: Fixed removing weights from vertices weighted fully to a single bone turning them into unweighted vertices.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Bug Fix:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Animation: Editing the text field in the curve editor of an anim montage no longer crashes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Editor",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Datasmith",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed 3dsmax plugin support for 2026.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Framework",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed GetOwnerPackages() for instanced structs inside non-complex properties.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FStructurePropertyNode::GetOwnerPackages() fails at walking up the property nodes for a specific case, and may trigger an ensure. When stumbling upon an instanced struct, GetOwnerPackages() walks up by getting the direct parent.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "However, this parent is not necessarily a complex parent (can be a non-object/structure property type). To make sure the walk happens correctly, the case should be handled the same way GetInstancesNum() does (get complex parent of parent).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a few virtuals to cosmetic SGraphNode getters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Useful while adding advanced styling in custom node editors. In some cases it might be possible to avoid overriding engine methods by implementing our own variants, with different names, but not in every case.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also reusing original methods makes the programmer's intent much clearer - what part of the base class was actually overridden.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implements experimental Capture Stealing in ITF Input Router.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated MathStructCustomization metadata extraction to include InstanceMetadata",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This change updates metadata extraction for header row to include InstanceMetadata. It is useful when assigning metadata to Vector/IntVector types via other customizations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UToolMenu Items will now override any parent Tool Menu Items of the same name.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Positioned Tool Menu Items that fail to be positioned will now be inserted at the end of the section.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved reliability of legacy SExtensionPanel support in the new viewport toolbar. Extensions are only enabled when there is enough information to support their existence.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "ToolMenus: Adds options for whether a Tool Menu Entry with an insert position that can't find its target should insert anyways and/or log.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Defaults to both inserting & logging.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Disables logging if the ToggleViewportToolbar and ToggleHideViewportUI commands can't find the ToggleFullscreen command in the Level Editor Window menu.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an edge case Blueprint Editor crash on exit.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where top-level toggle buttons in Viewport Toolbars looked like raised buttons.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Users can now change the derived type on default value instantiations used to initialize a base type reference member in saved instance data when using override serialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the asset reference filtering not working when dropping assets on Material, Niagara Script and Texture Graphs, or on nodes and pins of any asset graph type.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed inconsistencies between drag and drop visual feedback and drop behavior in Animation State Machine, Sound Cue, and Texture Graphs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The old Level Viewport Toolbar Panel Extensions are now deprecated. They will be removed in a later version.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Interchange",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced memory usage when importing static meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a SubdivisionAPI custom schema for specifying per-prim subdivision level.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for array node attributes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for subdividing static meshes and geometry caches when importing via USD Interchange.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added more C++ UsdWrapper types and tweaked the Unreal.natvis file to improve how they're displayed on the debugger.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Upgraded MaterialX version to v1.39.3.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Textures imported with non-power-of-2 dimensions or non-multiple-of-4 dimensions were previously automatically set to NeverStream and Uncompressed. This can now be toggled with a config setting :TextureImportSettings::bDoAutomaticTextureSettingsForNonPow2Textures .",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also when textures initially imported as nonpow2 are re-imported as pow2, they now get their settings automatically fixed to the defaults for pow2 textures.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the performance of importing skeletal meshes with multiple morph targets via USD Interchange.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When importing USD stages through USD Interchange, SkeletalMeshComponent prims will be spawned with AnimSequences assigned to them, if any were imported.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a \"Use Single Bone\" option to import a static mesh as a skeletal mesh with top node as the only bone.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "If \"Force All Mesh as Type\" is set to \"Skeletal Mesh\" and \"Use Single Bone\" is checked, the imported skeletal mesh will have a unique bone at its origin called \"Root\".",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new option to the USD Export Options dialog when exporting levels to USD called \"Export to Nested Sub Folders\", which restores the previous behavior of exporting asset layers to a folder structure that mirrors the content folder structure",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Interchange: Added support for importing OBJ into level.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced memory usage when importing skeletal meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Upgraded OpenUSD version to v25.08.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Interchange USD can now import groom assets and groom caches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for dome lights via SkyLightComponents when importing via USD Interchange.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed FNavigationOctree::AddNode Warnings during Level Import.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented a Nanite triangle threshold value on the Interchange generic asset pipeline, in order to enable Nanite only for meshes past a triangle count size.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The USD Interchange translator has a new setting for collecting prim metadata as translated node user attributes. It can also specify a regex for filtering of particular metadata fields.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored the LevelSequence handling for USD imports in order to properly support subsections due to references and payload arcs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Importing via USD Interchange will now reuse generated assets when importing instanced prims.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for OpenUSD on Windows ARM64.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored skeleton handling in Interchange USD to not consider the skeleton prim itself as a root joint, which prevents transforms applied directly to the skeleton from being ignored in some cases.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Interchange USD imports that preserve the pseudoroot node will now produce a top-level actor named after the root layer's display name, as opposed to being always named \"/\"",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now uses the default static mesh collision profile for static meshes generated via the USD Stage Actor imports.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Reimport not showing skeletal mesh conflicts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed missing AnimSequence assets when importing animation tracks via Interchange that have a total length below MINIMUM_ANIMATION_LENGTH (of 1/30 seconds)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "USD: Editing keys in Sequencer now properly update back to the USD Stage.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed node name collision suffixes appending to previous suffixes, producing names like Cube12345",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed actors with identity transform being imported via Interchange with the inverse transform of their parents in some cases.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed imported LevelSequences overwriting others with the same name when importing some very complex USD scenes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed cameras imported from OpenUSD with fStop of zero so that depth of field effects are correctly disabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect skeletons being imported via Interchange FBX in some edge cases when TransformLinks seem to represent local transforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed static mesh collider transforms being incorrect in some cases when importing into level with Interchange.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed some issues with baked skinned mesh transforms when importing skeletal meshes with morph targets via USD Interchange.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed how AnimSequences seemed to have no animation data after using Actions -&gt; Import on the USD Stage Editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issues with using Material Search Location when importing scenes with Material Instances via USD Interchange.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed automated reimports still showing the options dialog when reimporting via Interchange or USD.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed metadata not making it onto actor AssetUserData when importing scenes via Interchange in some scenarios.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now discards empty LevelSequences when importing from USD.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed SparseVolumeTexture assets not being generated by USD Interchange when importing scenes with volumes if the exact same volume node shows up on the stage more than once.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when trying to parse USD LodSubtreeAPI schema applied to skinned meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed import of UsdPreviewSurface into Material Instances for USD materials that have output connections to other shader graph or material prims.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed performance bottleneck when importing many lights via USD Interchange.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed some name-prefix-based collision meshes not being correctly used when importing via Interchange in some cases involving name collision.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now generate the desired simple collision meshes even if the shape disagrees with the provided mesh data.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed morph target normals and position offsets not being skinned with geomBindTransform when importing skinned meshes via USD.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed how Interchange USD was not using timeCodesPerSecond values when baking skeletal animation tracks.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect vertex ordering of subdivision surface meshes imported from OpenUSD when their orientation is \"leftHanded\" and subdivision is enabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when parsing some USD SkelRoots configurations with multiple Mesh prims that contain normals.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed how USD asset imports were persistently disabling the \"Import Into Level\" option to import actors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed OpenVDB being imported via USD stages without compensation for the stage's upAxis and metersPerUnit values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed level exports to USD always using absolute file paths for layer references and payloads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Euler flipping issues when importing some USD stages with complex rotation animation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed invalid skeletons being produced when importing some USD stages with prim names that are not globally unique.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed various issues while importing an asset containing elements named \"None\"",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed support for UDIM textures when opening or importing USD Stages via the USD Stage Actor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Silence a couple warnings when trying to fetch transforms from Interchange scene nodes with none authored.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed missing actors and assets when importing scenes via USD Interchange that contain sibling prims whose names differ only by character casing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when resaving assets imported with Interchange after deserializing them with Interchange disabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed HeterogeneousVolumeComponents not refreshing after their SparseVolumeTextures imported via USD Interchange were reimported.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect skeletal mesh influences when importing skeletons with multiple root bones via Interchange USD.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed various import issues related to using names that resolve to NAME_None.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed risk of missing content when importing FBX containing assets or bones requiring name sanitization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix SparseVolumeTexture assets imported via Interchange USD ending up named as \"Null\" if the VDB filename itself was purely numeric.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the handling of some skeletal mesh edge cases via Interchange USD, like nested LOD meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix transforms placed directly on LOD meshes being ignored when importing into level with Interchange USD.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Scripting",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed FullyLoadPackages/FullyLoadAssets functions to editor scripting via EditorLoadingAndSavingUtils",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "These fully load the given objects, so that UE no longer has a write lock on their on-disk files (eg, when needing to overwrite the file via an external application).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is also available in the UI via Asset Actions -&gt; Load, if you hold shift while clicking on Load.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for texture-based tool icons in Scriptable tools.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for setting a custom UUserWidget above the tool details panel of a Scriptable Tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Preview Platform Blueprint Functions:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "TogglePreviewPlatform: Toggle the Preview Platform On/Off",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "SetPreviewPlatform: Sets the Preview Platform.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The Preview Platform is set from a list of valid Preview Platforms, the same present in the Preview Platform Menu.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Disable Preview Platform Blueprint Node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a GetDrawableGeometryActor() BP function to fetch the actor that owns any line, point and triangle sets added by a Scriptable tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed FTSTicker to Python:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This exposes the superior and safer FTSTicker-based ticking method to Python, and existing Python scripts using the Slate-based ticking methods should consider migrating to use this new method (unless forwarding ticks to an embedded UI framework, which was the intent of the Slate-based ticking methods).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The new ticker callables can be registered via `unreal.register_ticker_callback(...)`, which takes a callable (taking a float delta time, and returning a bool where True means continue to tick), along with the delay (in seconds; default 0) that we should apply between each ticker callback. `unreal.unregister_ticker_callback(...)` can be used to remove a previously registered ticker callback.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Examples:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "def run_once(dt): print(\"run_once\") return False # stop ticking",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "unreal.register_ticker_callback(run_once, 1.0) # call run_once once after 1 second",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "def run_many(dt): print(\"run_many\") return True # continue ticking",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "run_many_handle = unreal.register_ticker_callback(run_many, 1.0) # call run_many repeatedly after 1 second delays",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "unreal.unregister_ticker_callback(run_many_handle) # stop calling run_many",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed the ability to include or exclude editor-only references from script asset registry queries",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an encoding fix for PipInstall to force a utf-8 encoding.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in ExecutePythonScript when Python was disabled at runtime.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when re-registering Scriptable tools during mode shutdown.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed reachable garbage objects warnings when compiling ScriptableTools containing ScriptablePoint/Line/Triangle sets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with accept/cancel/complete actions not firing in ScriptableTools mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed 'no world was found for object' warnings when invoking WorldContextObject functions in a Scriptable tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when calling DataTable RemoveRow from editor scripting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed non-deterministic tool order in Scriptable Tools category palettes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a fix to ensure AssetTools do not call slate functions in headless.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Python Callback attached to Dynamic Delegate",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Editor can now run even if Python is not able to load properly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "UI",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Significantly improved the Content Browser column sort performance for large search results.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated the Content Browser navigation bar so clicking in the empty space edits the package path if available instead of the virtual path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Slate drawing optimization: fixed float comparison of the alpha that could send an invisible element to the renderer, for negative or small alpha values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "In the graph editors, right clicking to summon the node context menu now includes the hovered wires connected pins, if any. This allows, for example, insertion of a 'NOT boolean' node on a bool wire in the blueprint editor",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the \"Show Selected\" action for actors always visible in the context menu.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "SlateIM: Add support for Tab widgets",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "CommonUI:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated CommonWidgetCarousel to be more consistent in its widget caching.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an option to determine whether or not to cache widgets at all",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Old behavior was to cache widgets in the carousel's RebuildWidget, but widgets added at runtime via AddChild would never be cached.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Currently caching is enabled by default to match the behavior when children were added at design-time, though this could result in increased memory usage in use cases where all widgets were added dynamically.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a clockwise ordering option for DynamicEntryBox.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated the source control Submit dialog to display full file paths for non-asset files in the Path column.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Waveform editor: Add icons for fade options",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Waveform:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now calculates LUFS and Sample Peak values on audio import, on Waveform Editor open, and on Waveform Transformation changes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now displays LUFS and Sample Peak as meta data when hovering over a soundwave in the content browser.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Path column in the Asset View will now display the package or object path of the row item if available instead of the virtual path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Redesigned Platforms menu moved from the toolbar to the main menu.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now specify a screenshot view rect via FScreenshotRequest::RequestScreenshot:The view rect will be ignored if it is invalid (empty or not within the extent of the render target), or if bShowUI=true, since that takes the slate widget screenshot pathDefault behavior remains the same (to screenshot the whole window)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled 10-bit swap chains on desktop platforms even when the feature level is ES31.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Slate: Modified GetCachedWidget:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetCachedWidget now returns the Widget returned by RebuildWidget.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetWrappedWidget returns the Widget return by RebuildDesignWidget if available. Otherwise, returns the widget returned by UIComponents via RebuildWidgetWithContent.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added InitializeInEditor function to UserWidgetExtension and WidgetBlueprintGeneratedClassExtension to be able to support proper initialization in Editor for Extensions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added utility functions to query private states in the widget.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UMG Bindings: Added a new Conversion Function SetVectorParameter that takes a FColor and converts to FLinearColor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for package path suggestions to the Content Browser navigation bar.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for navigating to C++ class package and object paths entered into the Content Browser navigation bar.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized the font shaping process when using complex shaping (typically for Arabic).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Python script for generating an html color palette for the FColorList class.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated mouse capture and high precision mode handling on Windows to save up to .5ms on redundant API calls",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "A UFont can now be a wrapper around FCoreStyle::GetDefaultFont(), for use with editor UI.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a CVar `Slate.UseSharedBreakIterator` to support shared ICU Break Iterators to reduce CPU usage. False by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added new Header and ToolHeader sections to the ToolkitBuilder.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for MVVM Bindings in asset diff tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed world context pin on MVVMViewModelBase. This allows blueprints on a Viewmodel to access world subsystems (assuming they have an object they can use to resolve the world context).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add SetLazyContentWithCallback to CommonLazyWidget to improve async usage in blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add blueprint function, SetViewModelByClass, for setting VM by class on a widget directly to simplify usage.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed a setter for CategoryToolbarVisibility in FToolkitBuilder.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a regression where Toolbar buttons with a combined options menu did not display that options menu when the toolbar button was clipped.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where Spline-related UI elements were displaying XYZ axis labels and tooltips even when the editor was running in LUF coordinate mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Details: Updated the context menu and details panel for Splines so that axis labels, tooltips, and action names now correctly reflect LUF when active.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This includes context menu areas like SnapAllToSelected, SnapToLastSelected, and SetLockedAxis (temporarily disabled).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This also includes Details panel areas for Spline settings like Selected Spline Nodes Location, Rotation, Scale, Arrive Tangent, Leave Tangent, and Up Vector Logic was added to ensure these UI elements are now dynamically aligned with the current coordinate system.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "XYZ (FLU) remains the fallback when LUF is not enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UMG Sequencer: Fixed 2 issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When adding an event track as the first item in a widget animation, the duration of the animation would reset to 0, and notably the playback range start would be set to exclusive (range as (0,0)). This would persist after the length changed, for example to (0,500), meaning that any items placed on the 0 frame, such as events, would never evaluate.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When not encountering the above issue, items placed on the 0 frame would evaluate twice. This was due to a refactor to the way widget animation would playback.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the Asset View Type column sorting by the full class path rather than the display name that is displayed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UMG:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed named slot content not saving for named slot instances of widget blueprints that extend widget blueprints.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed CDO de-sync with root widget property changes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a fix to avoid crashes in cases of re-entrancy.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Various fixes for widget animations:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed a crash caused by the runner being invalid for an unknown reason.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed iteration of active animations that can grow during that iteration.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed iteration of animated widgets that can grow during that iteration.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed first and last frame evaluation of animations - Don't tick the widget on the first frame, wait until the next frame. The flag for that was lost during the animation refactor in 5.6 - Fix the evaluation time for when stopping which should indeed be the first frame of the playrange, not frame 0. This was incorrectly ported during the animation refactor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed how we consume the current animation time on play, to prevent events at frame 0 from firing twice.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Double clicking on a color key in the timeline now correctly opens the color picker.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an inconsistency in the Viewport right-click context menu, where the Transform options were always ordered according to FLU rather than the expected LUF, even with LUF coordinate system in use. Behavior is now consistent and context-aware across coordinate systems.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now pick struct type when class type picking is enabled, eg, from within the Data Table editor",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UMG Designer:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fix to FWidgetBlueprintEditor::SelectObject to support UObject selection. Fixes a nullptr access when a property was changed in the detail panel on an object that is not a UWidget.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash in Drag and Drop operation. Added more checks around calls to GetCachedWidget that can return a null object during drag/drop and move operation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash in UMG Designer Replace widget context menu operation in the Hierarchy panel. This happened when using the replace function with a User Created widget selected in the Palette panel.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized the widget editor's palette to reduce refresh cost in large projects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed virtual texture thumbnails sometimes showing the wrong texture.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where screen-space widget components wouldn't render for players other than player 1 if splitscreen is disabled. There is now an option (ShowAllPlayerWidgetsWhenSplitscreenDisabled) to overlay the player layers, instead of culling out all player layers except for player 1.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a regression that caused the editor to crash when attempting to place a cooked Actor-based Blueprint class via drag/drop.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a memory leak when trying to trigger the display of a FCanvasBatchedElementRenderItem without a primitive to draw.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where SearchableComboBox couldn't be set back to the same value after resetting to default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where SCommonButton wouldn't release when it loses focus",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a rare crash in SlateRHIRenderer due to both main thread and render thread possibly writing to the same arrays simultaneously.",
