            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now call BlueprintFunctionLibrary functions from classes that do not implement GetWorld or ShowWorldContextPin. It now always shows the pins if needed and will always connect invisible pins even if they are marked as optional.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a SetFocusInViewport node to UScriptableInteractiveTool. This means scriptable tools can give focus to the viewport so that key bindings pass through without user interaction.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Blueprint Debug Draw Line / Point / etc. methods now have the option to draw with 'screen' depth priority.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added ToRotationVector, MakeFromRotationVector and GetShortestArcWith to the Kismet Math Library.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Structs tagged as HasNativeMake can now still have their individual members set.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Asset/Actor Actions in Developer folders show for everyone.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetBlutilityClasses already had code to ensure that we don't list other devs' blutilities.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "However, it didn't use the correct path format, which caused FPaths::IsUnderDirectory to always return false.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Similarly, UEditorUtilitySubsystem::HandleStartupAssets never had a similar filter to begin with.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed failure to copy instanced Blueprint component value overrides on copy/paste workflows.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "CollectionsManagerScriptingSubsystem:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed a warning from GetAssetsInCollection when an asset could not be found.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where logs displayed as red despite actually being warnings.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an editor crash after clicking on a deleted graph node hyperlink in the Blueprint editor's compiler results tab.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UK2Node_VariableGet::SetPurity erroneously removed the SetPurity function from the public API of UK2Node_VariableGet. This fix now re-adds SetPurity, but changes its implementation to use TogglePurity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an editor crash after clicking on a deleted graph node hyperlink in the Blueprint editor's compiler results tab.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when editing children from a cooked Blueprint that had editor-only components.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "User defined structs with Text fields with non-trivial default values no longer alter themselves on load.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Blueprint diff tool now reports changes to Create Event Node's signature function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed potential for ICH override template namespace collision after reparenting an Actor-based Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The engine no longer crashes when it exits while a search in Blueprints is ongoing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added more crash report context to paths where we are failing to resolve a node's owning Blueprint and/or graph, while using an ensure to avoid crashing the editor as a result.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Blueprint Compiler",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash in SerializeUnversionedProperties during cooking.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash when cooking blueprints with local object references set to objects in asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed compiler failing to find newly added functions on Blueprint interfaces, which led to implemented functions being renamed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed one cause of 'Reachable Garbage' when recompiling Blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Blueprint's delegate signature checking logic no longer accidently looks at local variables when matching function signatures.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed one cause of loss of Blueprint subobjects when a Blueprint that is contained in another Blueprint is compiled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in garbage collection due to mislinked SKEL_ classes, most frequently seen during long-running cook operations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Blueprint Runtime",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug where arrays of structs with custom identical operators could fail to copy from Blueprint generated classes correctly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed push-model blueprint array property not properly marked dirty if modified by different actor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The root cause of the issue is due to incorrect function signatures on array function thunks. Several of them mark their input array as 'const', but clearly change the array.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When push-model support was added, this problem was discovered and worked around by adding MARK_PROPERTY_DIRTY calls directly in the thunks. The problem with this solution is that it doesn't work when we change an array on a different actor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, the thunk doesn't have enough information to determine that easily.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The correct solution is to leverage the existing code in FKCHandler_CallFunction that has sufficient context to inject MarkPropertyDirtyNode accurately.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "In order to get array functions working, we needed to fix their signatures to use UPARAM(ref) instead of 'const'. One issue with this fix is that there might be existing Blueprint code that incorrectly uses mutable array functions with read-only data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For now, we'll support this, but with a warning to fix the code as it'll become an error in 5.9. Currently, this warning is disabled until we fix affected content.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a memory leak when using containers with types that allocate memory by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Gameplay",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mover:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a method of canceling movement features by matching gameplay tags.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added User-Defined Struct support for Mover data collections, so Blueprint-only users can include custom data without requiring native code.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now supports spring-based walking mode work in networked play.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Reduced potential memory operations when adding to a data collection by preferring to copy onto an existing matching struct if possible.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added options for supporting root motion for non-vertical moves, which makes possible combining them with gravity-based falling.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a double buffer for cached sync state to avoid issues with reading in data that may be freed/overwritten.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Mover-Mass translators along with a Mover Integrations plugin to house various integrations between Mover and other systems.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "NavWalking mode now sets floor results in the Mover Blackboard when projecting to level geometry is enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an auto-expire policy option for rollback blackboard entries.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for blueprintable layered moves through a new system that splits up Layered Move Logic and Data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "This allows Layered Move Logic to be made natively and in Blueprints in an effort to expand blueprint support in Mover.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "These new layered moves exist alongside the old ones at the moment with the intention of these new moves eventually replacing the old ones.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added options for handling out-of-band movement changes, whether to warn about it and whether to accept it as the new starting sim state. Usage is primarily for non-networked play, where an external system is allowed to move the actor around, such as during cinematics or temporary physics simulation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Converted absolute timesteps to double-precision.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now supports avoiding state-copying operations when the simulation state doesn't change.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added AdditiveVelocity MixMode support to MultiJump Layered Move.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made small adjustments to the extended Mover pawn to make sure additive velocity is respected by turning off extra jump input from CharacterMoverComponent Jump.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added option for flat-bottom floor checks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added consistent angular velocity when changing movement modes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Adjusted mover API to use a FVector for angular velocity instead of a FRotator. This changes some public API related to Mover.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed the gravity orientation from angular velocity calculation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added simple montage replication support for the character-focused MoverComponent.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added first version of rollback-aware blackboard.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added experimental option to append inputs into sync state, for cases where you want to share inputs with sim proxies that are not simulated and may not have those inputs available.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made MoveInput and MoveInputType BlueprintReadOnly, so setting this input is done through specific functions only. This means we can properly apply some precision to input to make sure all clients/server have same value after NetSerialization.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cameras:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Blueprint getter nodes for camera rig parameters.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added evaluation context to transition conditions' API.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now shows the name of the camera rig on the rig prefab node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added more debug information for blend stacks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added ResolveCameraRigProxy method to Blueprint camera director.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved lens calibration camera node to the CameraCalibrationCore plugin",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Some changes to input slots:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now runs input nodes in OnRun. OnUpdateParameters is only meant for pre-blending input parameters, not running actual logic, if only because it is run in isolation on just a few nodes that opt-in.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Moved the revert axis options onto the base input slot class.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added a speed option on the input slot class. Pre-blend that instead of pre-blending the actual player input.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Moved the user-exposed option for accumulation onto the axis-binding specific node, in preparation of adding an actual accumulation node for more complex input chains.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Moved axis-binding code to a helper class in preparation of a \"raw\" input action node.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added raw input action and accumulator node for complex input chains.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added \"driven control rotation\" input node:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "This input node makes possible using a \"centralized\" player input system which drives control rotation on the pawn, while still enabling cameras to have different orientations, such as when using target preservation with various lateral offsets (and therefore parallax requiring converging cameras with different orientations).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The active camera rig uses control rotation as-is, but any blending-out camera rigs use their last control rotation driven by the \"delta\" control rotation each frame.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "This seems to be a good compromise between cameras limited by a single orientation and having player input managed by camera rigs individually.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the GetPlayerController method on the Blueprint camera node evaluator.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an option on camera components to set control rotation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the ability for the Camera Debugger panel to bind to specific camera system instances (for instance, picking which Gameplay Camera actor to debug).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When drag-and-dropping a camera or camera rig asset onto a level or a sequence, create the corresponding actor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Camera rig parameters now default to not pre-blended.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Defaulting to pre-blended benefited a few cases, but also caused visual bugs in a couple of other cases, so it's not worth turning it on by default.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved persistent rig activation functions onto the camera components and the camera manager.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "These Blueprint functions were previously global, affecting whatever camera system host was currently considered \"active\".",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "This turns out to be unclear and prone to errors. Now the user activates persistent rigs exactly on whatever they intend to.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now auto-create camera rigs and assets when nothing is specified on a Gameplay Camera component (but log a warning).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made the orientation initialization service available to 3rd parties, and added an API for overriding the target or yaw/pitch to preserve.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a Blueprint utility function to access the evaluated camera's orientation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added Teardown API for node evaluators, added layer and active camera rig information.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Made node evaluator and evaluation service flags inclusive by default (i.e. opt-out).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added a new \"initialize with ideal framing\" option on screen-space framing nodes.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a \"family shortcut\" bar to various camera asset editors for helping navigate between related assets.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Users can now set variables to be pre-blended.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made QoL improvements to the Blueprint camera node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added bone/socket options to the attach to player pawn node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved advanced camera shakes (add shake instance IDs and the ability to interrupt and stop a shake), improved the internal API for implementing shake nodes, and fixed a few bugs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Implemented a more proper auto-build for camera assets for PIE.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GAS:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved logging for missing attributes in FActiveGameplayEffectHandle when using GetGameplayEffectMagnitude.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gameplay Tag display ends in an ellipsis when the display is cut off rather than overflowing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gameplay Tag and Tag Container meta data \"DisplayShortTagNames\" will now remove the Categories filter from the beginning of the Tag chip in the details panel.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gameplay Effects stacking options now have better names and comments.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "CooldownGameplayEffectClass validation: When a GameplayAbility is configured with a cooldown GE class, validation will check whether that GE applies any tags.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated the GameplayTagCountContainer to serialize tags itself and provide for fine control of what tags should replicate where via EGameplayTagReplicationState enum.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Exposing common GameplayEffectSpecHandle and ActiveGameplayEffectHandle queries to Blueprint. The following Blueprint callable functions have been added to AbilitySystemBlueprintLibrary to empower Blueprint programmers when making GameplayAbilities. Since some GameplayAbilityTask callbacks only provide a GE spec handle and/or active GE handle, now you can do more with those handles:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetGrantedTags: Gets gameplay tags granted by a Gameplay Effect, from the effect's spec handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetAssetTags: Gets gameplay tags describing the GameplayEffect, from the effect's spec handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetGameplayEffectFromSpecHandleIsDurationGameplayEffectSpecHandle: Whether a GameplayEffect is instant or non-instant.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "IsActiveGameplayEffectHandleValid: Whether a handle for an active GameplayEffect is a valid handle or not. Applied instant GEs don't result in an active handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "IsActiveGameplayEffectHandleActive: Whether a handle for an active GameplayEffect is a valid handle and it's still applied.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetAbilitySystemComponentFromActiveGameplayEffectHandle: Retrieving the AbilitySystemComponent from an active GE handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renaming a gameplay tag in the Gameplay Tag Manager now automatically renames all sub tags.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added predictive gameplay effect stacking and improved stack overflow handling.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The data validation error for when there is a null input trigger on a key mapping now includes the name of the input action which it is mapped to.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "You can now call \"SetShouldConsume\" on any Enhanced Input bound action handles.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "You can also define \"ENHANCED_INPUT_ALLOW_LEGACY_BINDING\" in your game's .build.cs file to enable legacy key bindings onto enhanced input components, making upgrading to enhanced input easier.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added GetActorFilter UPROPERTY meta support to object picker (mirroring GetAssetFilter).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a virtual function to UBlueprint, ShouldAutomaticallyRegisterInputOnConstruction, which can be overridden in widget blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a set of deprecated input action/axis names in the project settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added \"Setter=SetShowMouseCursor\" to APlayerController::bShowMouseCursor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added ReleaseGameFeaturePlugins for multiple plugins at once. Unloading plugins batches GC and GameplayTags tree changes together which improves performance of unloading operation",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an editor preference for setting a \"Simulated Device Mapping Policy\".",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This can be used in the editor to change how input devices get mapped to platform users, which can be useful for testing device connection sequences for your UI, log in flows, etc.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the current device mapping policy to the output of the \"Input.LogAllConnectedDevices\" command.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added helper functions to Ability system library: HasAnyAbilitiesWithCondition and HasAnyAbilitiesWithAssetTag",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added QueueWorkFunction and SendQueuedWork to the TaskSyncManager which can be used to queue a batch of function pointers to execute as a simple tick task. This can be used with RegisterTickGroupWorkHandle to safely schedule batched gameplay thread work from any worker thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Calling GetDeviceSpecificData now uses the given input device ID. If that is invalid, it uses the platform user's most recent device.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added LoadGameIfExistsAsync to SaveGameSystem which combines the exists and load checks into one async call to avoid an extra frame delay. Changed GameplayStatics to use this for async loads which fixes a warning when trying to load a nonexistent save game.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added ensure and comments to prevent creation of registered FTickableGameObjects on worker threads which is an unsafe race condition.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to the FTickableGameObject constructor to enable creating with a disabled tick, which is safe on a worker thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added bindable \"virtual\" accept and back FKeys.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a OnPostUserSettingsInitialized delegate to Enhanced Input, which will fire after the Enhanced Input User Settings have been initialized on the subsystem.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added more ways to detect a local player subsystem when using the node which does not have an explicit player controller target pin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented SlideAlongNavMesh option for CMC NavWalking mode. This means pawns in NavWalking mode can move along a navmesh rather than just moving towards a projected point on the navmesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "CineCamera: Added an option to disable dynamic exposure.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Previously, turning off depth-of-field with FocusMethod would also turn off exposure simulation. This was fixed recently, but also meant that CineCameraComponent would now always simulate exposure, which isn't always desirable.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This change adds a new ExposureMethod setting to allow disabling exposure too.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure that the key mappings \"supported key profile\" tag is respected, and made the OnKeyProfileChanged delegate Blueprint assignable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a race condition crash on shutdown of the SteamController plugin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an \"Input.LogAllConnectedDevices\" command to dump all the currently connected input devices and some metadata about them to the logs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced mouse input overhead on Windows by processing raw mouse moves on a separate FRunnable thread in the WindowsApplication..",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GameplayTags and GameplayTagContainers created in Blueprint give the user a way to edit the \"Categories\" metadata for tag filtering in the owning Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash where UPlayerInput::SmoothMouse would assert before it would attempt to divide by zero.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mover:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug in mover angular velocity clamping where the limit was not respected when rotating off axis",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added CommonLegacyMovementSettings shared settings in various movement modes to avoid a crash that could happen if they were the only mode added.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where pawns wouldn't follow a navlink off the navmesh if bSlideAlongNavMeshEdge was true.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Nav walking modes now force a navmesh projection if something comes along and invalidates our last floor information, such as teleportation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now initialize the Mover mode state machine earlier so it can be used in backend initialization if desired",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed NaN issue in UMovementUtils::ComputeVelocity that could happen when MoveDirectionIntent was zeroed out.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issue where backends could leave stale non-persistent structs in sync state between frames.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed several cases where strict equality checks on orientations could fail due to float point imprecision.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where a specified InputProducer could fail to have ProduceInput called on it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a Blueprint editor crash during validation if there's a shared settings object set to None.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issues with trying to maintain the small distance off of floors in falling/flying modes where a character could get pulled towards the floor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed improperly calculated angular velocity for mutli-axis rotation cases, and added utility function to compute it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug in standalone mode where the time step was being rounded down to the nearest whole millisecond.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed floating point precision error in mover's fixed delta time calculation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Finding a movement modifier by handle and by type now searches through the queued modifiers on the Mover State Machine as well. Fixes an issue where modifiers weren't found immediately after queuing them.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed local-&gt;world root motion conversions when non-yaw rotations are involved.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed cases where some movement modes were not respecting the setting for remaining vertical.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bugs where an actor can violate the min/max distance it's supposed to float above walkable floors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made sure we use BaseVisualComponentTransform to update PrimaryVisualComponent transform in FinalizeFrame so changes to BaseVisualComponentTransform apply to the visual component regardless of whether we're smoothing state or not.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now properly expose Movement Mode in-out references in GenerateMove and SimulationTick to Blueprint.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Searching modifiers by handle with an invalid handle will return nullptr rather than active modifiers with invalid handles that haven't been fixed up yet.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now passing along starting velocity in Falling modes if we didn't use any time. This fixes some velocity cancellation that sometimes causes a stutter on landing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cameras:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed main camera assets not being usable as Blueprint variables.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed crashes and bugs with rewind debugger integration.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improve debug info display with extra data, more filtering options, and a few other things.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed single-rig updates missing some of the steps the blend stack does.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed static initialization problems that can lead to debug blocks not saving their fields in trace files.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer freezes camera rigs during stateless evaluations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer warns about a camera asset not using any rigs if it's using proxies, and builds any rigs in the proxy table.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when a camera's enter or exit transitions have empty pins.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an incorrect reset-to-default behavior on the camera parameter editor UI.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevents infinite recursion when there's a cyclic reference of camera rigs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed gameplay tag transition condition; when a tag query is specified, it should fail if there is no previous/next camera rig.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Normalized yaw/pitch for spline orbit node",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can now run the target ray-cast node when there's no player controller.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can now build and run camera rigs and shakes with no root node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevent rig prefab nodes referencing their own camera rig.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer throws asserts or error messages when we have a camera actor without an asset specified on it",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed activating persistent rigs during director initialization, and having these rigs receive custom parameter overrides.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now validates that exposed camera rig parameters have the correct type for what they're connected to.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed possible crash in GPC camera manager when the last evaluation context is removed from the stack.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer updates dampers and interpolators when the delta-time is zero.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now properly freeze blends (possibly mid-blending) when freezing a camera rig in a blend stack.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed simple fixed-time blends not saving/restoring their current time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when changing the type of a camera rig parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer shows byte/int types for data parameters.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now resolves camera rig name conflicts when building the property bag for a camera asset.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed camera rig parameter nodes not being added to the list of graph objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed assert when adding an enum data parameter to a camera rig.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed broken \"inline\" evaluation of camera shake prefabs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer pre-blends camera variable table entries that are not flagged for it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed the tick group for the camera components.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when running editor builds without an editor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added missing initialization call for blend nodes in merged camera rigs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The camera reference widget is now disabled if overridden with a rig parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when connecting a camera variable reference to a camera rig parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where rigs could keep running with old data after their asset was rebuilt.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed \"Home\" button in camera rig editor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Deleted references to camera variables when a variable collection is deleted.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a possible crash when running with unbuilt or outdated rigs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed Blueprint breakpoints not working on GET/SET parameter nodes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed shake prefab node not passing shake parameter values over to the visual layer in deferred mode.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed SET parameters nodes not setting anything if the parameter wasn't already known in the variable/data tables.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed error messages for unexpected situations lerping/overriding variable tables.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed variable and context data tables sometimes returning uninitialized memory, and replace assert with one-time warning.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer uses manual focus distance on the output camera component if the focus distance isn't set.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed pin types and colors for some data parameters.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed incorrect parameter/pin types on the Blueprint camera node for object and class pointers.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Camera modifier rigs added from the player camera manager should now be aware of the player controller.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added fixes for the player camera manager:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "No longer double-updates Gameplay Camera actors",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now run the vanilla (Blueprint-based) camera modifiers ourselves after the camera system.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
