```json
                        "content": "Now sets the transform of the camera manager itself to where the final viewpoint is.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GAS:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Consolidated code that checks whether an AttributeSet's FProperty represents a gameplay attribute, and improved coverage and stability:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "FGameplayAttribute details customization dropdown will only show attribute set properties that represent GameplayAttributes. Previously it showed all properties.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GameplayDebugger will now also display doubles. Doubles as FGameplayAttributes remain supported for legacy reasons.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed GameplayDebugger crash when an UAttributeSet had any int32 UPROPERTY().UAttributeSet::InitFromMetaDataTable now only processes property types that can back gameplay attributes.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when debugging gameplay effects with aggregate by source stacks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where SetTagMapCount didn't call OnTagUpdated like the other tag update functions. This will now be called when Gameplay Cue tags and Loose Tags are added and removed (No change for changing values that don't add or remove the tag).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed target data recalculating source tags and attributes when applying Effect Spec.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GameInstance pointer for Async Actions is correctly reset after it is un-registered.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Network Prediction: Changed static initialization of FNetworkPredictionModelDefRegistry's singleton to avoid issues with static initialization happening out of order causing registered Network Prediction model definitions to be skipped/removed. Also, made some minor adjustments to FNetworkPredictionModelDefRegistry::FinalizeTypes to avoid potential ODR issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an error in ULocalPlayerSaveGame::IsSaveInProgress where it always returned true even if one was not in progress.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an ensure to protect against missing player state crashes during seamless travel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Map placed actor Event Dispatcher duplicates:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "A map placed Blueprint actor's bindings to another map placed actor's multicast delegates (including Event Dispatchers) are now cleaned up when the actor is destroyed and reinstanced.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes a bug that bindings to other actors' multicast delegates accumulate when recompiling an actor blueprint. Previously this resulted in event nodes firing multiple times, increasingly when the Blueprint is recompiled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now return the playercontroller if found from the owner.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Network Prediction: fixed crash in smoothing service that could occur after adding more simulation objects during runtime",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed replication issue canceling Gameplay Abilities when destroying the ASC from the server while abilities are active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Multiply (Compound) modifiers not calculating correctly with stacked GameplayEffects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented a crash in APlayerCameraManager when the owning player controller has been GC'ed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Input triggers and modifiers will now properly respect the priority of an input mapping context. This fixes a bug where if you had the same input modifier class on an input mapping context of a different priority, it would always use the modifier values of the one which was pushed to the stack first.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed code that removes ?listen from client URLs to work correctly with # options as well.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured that the \"SlateApp.GetModifierKeys\" function will return the correct values when called on platforms using GameInput to process keyboards.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed OnBlendComplete not being broadcast in Standalone (non-networked) games.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Find-in-Blueprints: When a BP member variable is a struct, its members' default values are now searched and returned as results. Map keys are not supported yet.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Chaos Mover: Fixed floating point precision error in ChaosMoverStateMachines's fixed delta time calculation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer restarts a camera animation blend out when reaching the blend out time if we were already stopping.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed DefaultToInstanced subobjects breaking on blueprint duplication.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed instanced subobjects, including DefaultToInstanced classes and UPROPERTY(Instanced), breaking when a blueprint class with instanced subobjects got duplicated.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes the following editor actions which previously resulted in data loss:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Duplicating blueprints with user defined instanced subobjects.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Duplicating blueprints with GAS attribute set DefaultSubobjects.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Player Input: Fixed a bug where if you had an input component whose outer was a subobject of the currently controlled pawn, the input component would be processed twice.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "One example where this could be a common issue is within the \"Modular Gameplay Framework\". Users would add a UInputComponent to some UActorComponent, and then call \"PushInputComponent\" on the owning player controller. This would result in the UInputComponent being processed twice.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This would happen because in \"APlayerController::BuildInputStack\" it calls \"GetComponents\" on the controlled pawn, which would return the UInputComponent which had already been pushed to the controller's input stack, thus adding it twice to the stack for processing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enhanced Input: Do not load platform-specific override data on post load of the platform settings. If you are referencing an object that is in a plugin, this will just fail anyway and does not improve any sort of loading behavior.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an incorrect Deleter being used on FGameplayAbilityTargetData when calling FilterTargetData, and exposed FGameplayAbilityTargetDataDeleter for this purpose.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Use this deleter when creating an FGameplayAbilityTargetData using FMalloc, such as in UAbilitySystemBlueprintLibrary::FilterTargetData.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When creating TSharedPtr to FGameplayAbilityTargetData which was created with FMemory::Malloc, please use the FGameplayAbilityTargetDataDeleter",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated the \"Speech Mappings\". These speech mappings were originally added to support Hololens, which is no longer a supported platform and can be removed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed the deprecated functions on the camera manager, GetCameraCachePOV and GetLastFrameCameraCachePOV.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GAS: Deprecated StackType to make it private in the future, use new accessors instead.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Mass",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added time-slicing with FMassEntityQuery::FExecutionLimiter to limit execution to a set entity count.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Mass command for grouping entities.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mass Debugger:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added \"Open In Query Editor\" button to all query displays in the debugger.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added handle-based sorting of entities on the Entities tab.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Completely overhauled breakpoints with new types, filtering, hit counters, session to session persistence, copy-paste.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added query editor UI with load/save and copy/paste support for authored queries.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Fragments view tab.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added new \"Selected Entity\" breakpoint filter to break for whichever entity is selected in the gameplay debugger or debug UI.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FMassFragmentRequirements and FMassEntityQuery are no longer UStructs, which they were never supposed to be.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added observers locking to commands flushing. This change results in batching observers calls, significantly reducing the number of individual observers executions (~20 times in CitySample).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added MassQueryExecutor to unify the functions of MassQuery and MassProcessor and create a foundation to remove dependency on UObjects for Mass processing in the future.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Simplified Mass data access with templated UE::Mass:FAccessors collection.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to fetch base-typed fragment views from Execution context while providing the actual, specific class with a UScriptStruct pointer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "CFragment concept now checks whether types are std::is_trivially_copyable and if not emits errors requiring users to manually mark fragment types that are not trivially copyable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The goal is to educate fragment creators about good practices and point out fragments that might accidentally violate the requirement.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated FMassBatchedCommand::Execute as a const function and introduced non-const replacement named `Run`.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Unfortunately a new name had to be introduced since the constness of the function is the only thing that's changing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a temporary construct to MassCommandBuffer to statically detect commands that still implement the deprecated virtual Execute in an attempt to make it easier for people updating their code to notice the change.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The construct will check at compile time all the pushed commands of known types and statically assert if the command type still overrides the deprecated `Execute` function.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Entity Builder API extension, supporting use of an arbitrary \"element\" type and having the builder figure out what kind of an element that is and store it appropriately. Additional changes:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed FEntityBuilder::AddInternal implementation to not add duplicated instances of a given element type if one is already present.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added creation context to the deferred path, to ensure the fragment values are already set when the observers kick in. This was already done in the synchronous path, so this change addresses the inconsistency",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a couple of functions to MassEntityManager, that deal with types passed in as UScriptStruct, and pass the argument to the appropriate function, based on the type (Tag or Fragment).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mass Command Buffer API extension:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "PushUniqueCommand: the function lets callers add a hand-crafted command. Use it to push commands that you don't want to get merged with other commands of the same type.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "AddTag and RemoveTag: added versions that take an array view of entity handles.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "DestroyEntities: Added a version with rvalue ref parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added FMassFragmentRequirements::AddElementRequirement that can be called at runtime with UScriptStruct.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It will add the provided type to Fragment or Tag bitsets, depending on the type represented.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added FMassRepresentationParameters::Identical to implement logically-correct FMassRepresentationParameters instances comparison. The operation by design ignores CachedDefaultRepresentationType and CachedRepresentationActorManagement.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to ask a MassCommandBuffer about its host thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UMassVisualizationTrait can now be configured to not check mesh descriptions for validity which can be used to procedurally populate trait instances.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed inconsistencies between single and multi-threaded deferred command flushing in FMassProcessingPhase::ExecuteTick.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modified the occasionally failing ensure condition in UInstancedActorsData::OnInstancedActorDestroyed and provided it with more comments and a message to emit.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Properly handle shared fragment hash collisions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mass puppet actors now get destroyed immediately when the puppet is destroyed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed configuration issues of FMassProcessingContext created in UMassSpawnerSubsystem::DoSpawning for running initializer processors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The original configuration was flushing commands if any have been issued, but did so in a way that forced flushing of all the system's commands accumulated up until that point. That resulted in different behavior in entity spawning depending on whether there were initializers for a given entity available or not.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The new configuration results in keeping the behavior consistent, regardless of initializers presence, which is to not flush commands and if any are issued they will be appended to the main buffer when FMassProcessingContext goes out of scope.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MassGameplay:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when a mass representation actor is destroyed while mass simulation is active.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a teardown crash in MassAgentComponent.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a situational crash in UMassRepresentationSubsystem on world teardown.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MassAgentComponent changes to update EntityHandle-to-actor mapping in MassActorSubsystem when dealing with a player-owned component.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The change fixes an issue with GameplayDebugger's Mass category not being able to display info on the player-owned entity. A tiny change to the category removes the friction when doing that (no longer requiring the transform fragment to display data).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue in FMassEntityQuery::ParallelForEachEntityChunk stemming from the code not taking into consideration that ParallelForEach's workers can be moved between threads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "If that happened and the query was run with `bAllowParallelCommands == true`, then the command buffer would complain about being used outside of the thread of its creation. The fix is updating the thread ID of the command buffer whenever it's picked up.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now sorting observer processors to utilize UMassProcessor.ExecutionPriority.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed FarmTest to not crash on PIE:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The existing implementation is crashing since the changes to processor initialization have not been applied there.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This issue is limited to the farm-test, due to the custom and legacy way of setting up and running processors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed standalone-game IA uses by properly talking to ServerInstancedActorsSpawnerSubsystem, which fixes some IA representation issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also, ServerInstancedActorsSpawnerSubsystem has been fixed to `FinishSpawning` actors only once their IAComponent has been configured.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Marked UMassCapsuleTransformToMassTranslator as \"game-thread only\" to avoid data races when the observed component is modified in game thread as the data is being accessed by the processor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Networking",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented RPC state stomp detection which can detect state buffer writes between quantization and serialization. The cvar to control this is net.Iris.RPC.ServerStompDetectionEnabled which is false by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Support Iris when using NMT_JoinNoPawn and NMT_JoinNoPawnSplit.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adding an FSocket::ReleaseNativeSocket for use with native socket API's (e.g. asio). Using this new function inside the TraceAnalysis' FDirectSocketStream to support cases where we want multiple connections, not just a single connection (e.g. a multi-server capture).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Iris",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Implemented seamless travel support. If seamless travel support is not needed for a project the cvar net.Iris.AlwaysCreateLevelFilteringGroupsForPersistentLevels can be set to false to avoid unnecessary overhead of filtering objects in the persistent level.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Optimized polling to only poll objects/properties that are marked dirty.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added some async loading failure debugging cvars:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "net.Iris.AsyncLoading.FailPackageName Name: fails async loading all packages containing the package name.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "net.Iris.AsyncLoading.FailNextLoad 1: fails the next async load regardless of the name and resets the cvar.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "net.Iris.AsyncLoading.FailAllLoads 1: fails all loads until the cvar is set to 0.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gracefully handle reaching the end of the bitstream even if it's unexpected. The behavior is controlled via cvar net.Iris.ReplicationReader.GracefullyHandleReachingEndOfBitstream.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added better logging when handling end of bitstream issues. Reset the read journal when deserializing huge objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a NetDriver command for printing out all of the actors registered for replication (generic replication system only).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "NetEmulation:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added netEmulation setting to simulate buffer bloat on game traffic.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set PktBufferBloatInMS for outgoing packets and PktIncomingBufferBloatInMS for incoming packets.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Ex: 'netEmulatation.PktBufferBloatInMS 1000' will apply 1sec of buffer bloat on outgoing traffic.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "netEmulation.BufferBloatCooldownTimeInMS can also be used to set a cooldown period between each buffer bloat occurence.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Ex: 'netEmulation.BufferBloatCooldownTimeInMS 2000' means buffer bloat is not applied for 2secs after a buffer flush.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a \"BufferBloat\" emulation profile that enables buffer bloat of 400ms (in and out) over an 'average' emulation profile.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added metrics to measure the performance and behavior of the multiserver proxy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Multithreaded Iris Polling Step:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FObjectPoller can now kick off multiple FReplicationPollTasks, each of which processes a subset of the ObjectsConsideredForPolling array.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is set to process cache line sized Chunks in an interleaved pattern so that each task gets a roughly balanced amount of work, and we avoid false sharing the same cache line.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also supports the ForcePoll flow if PushModel is disabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added NetBitArray ForAllSetBitsInRange function to facilitate iterating over different parts of the same Array inside each task.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FNetTypeStats now supports threaded access through the use of ChildNetStatsContexts that are used during parallel phases and then accumulated into the parent context at the end of a frame.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Configuration is done at the ReplicationSystem level so that we can enable it just for GameNetDriver on the Server.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "We define a flag called bIsInParallelPhase which is true whilst the FReplicationPollTasks are running, and is used to protect against non-thread-safe access during this time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added capability for Networking Iris Polling phase to be run in parallel. This can be enabled by adding bAllowParallelTasks=true to the ReplicationSystemConfig",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MultiServer:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Refactored LaunchMultiServer script. Users can now derive from it to add their own features.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The -ProxyGameServers command-line argument can now accept a port range. This helps with launching multiple servers on a single host, so you can just use 127.0.0.1:9001-9025 for 25 servers.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "RemoteObjects: Now reschedules aborted ServerReplicateActor calls rather than retrying them.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where UActorChannel::ReplicateActor did not account written bits in one of the paths",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Renamed RepNotifies CSV stat to Generic_RepNotifies to better distinguish between Actor Channel based replication (generic) and Iris replication.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for closing child connections in the net driver and closing connections on the multiserver proxy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added mutators to UNetworkMetricsDatabase functionality.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Mutators can be added to UNetworkMetricsBaseListener and get a chance to process input metrics every frame. They report an output metric to their owning listener on the listener's reporting interval.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Use mutators to aggregate metrics that are set more frequently than a listener's reporting interval. Basic mutators for min, max, and average are provided.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added server-side network metrics for RawPing values across all client connections.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for actor replication relevancy when using the multiserver proxy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The multiserver proxy now shares a single NetGUID cache and objects are cached on the proxy when migrating between servers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash which could occur if an actor channel was removed during replay playback scrubbing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Iris:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bug with FastArraySerialzierFragment if using not replicating items.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bug where FGameplayAbilityTargetingLocationInfoNetSerializer would not properly call FreeDynamicState.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bug that could prevent a default subobject from receiving a large RPC.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fix edge case with prioritization causing a crash.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issue where dirty status of new subobjects created from PreUpdate of objects was masked out.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now resets NetBitStreamReader between batches to get correct read journal entries and clear overflow status.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "ObjectProperty class type is now validated property when serializing object references.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug where initial state was not applied when beginplay() was dispatched for world from AGameStateBase::OnRep_ReplicatedHasBegunPlay.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug that allowed adding subobjects to torn off root objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FScriptInterfaceNetSerializer can now handle blueprint implemented interfaces.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The ObjectReplicationBridge's AddDependentObject method will now prevent circular dependencies.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bitstream corruption that could lead to disconnects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now pass zero size to FNetBitStreamWriter's InitBytes method.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Network:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added UE_FAST_ARRAY_COMPILE_LOG_LEVEL that enables a program to control the compile time verbosity of LogNetFastTArray logs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Since this class is templated the logs in the functions are unique per implemented class so it can grow the amount of the log static strings if they are left compiled-in.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issue with FObjectReplicator's CanSkipUpdate with net.PushModelSkipUndirtiedReplication enabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made a change in UNetDriver::IsLevelInitializedForActor to avoid iterating over net connections if the actor we are evaluating has the correct world, or if the actor it is not a player controller",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "NetDriver:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed ping updates discarding higher ping values when multiple Acks were received in one packet.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For example this caused ping values to stay low during BufferFloat occurrences.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added RawPing metric that tracks the highest ping value received every frame.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "RawPing will not change if no packets are received or the incoming packets contain no new Acks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When using Iris replication, objects that have a spatial filter set at runtime will now always use their correct location for filtering calculations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When using Iris replication, actors and subclasses without explicit FilterConfig overrides in ObjectReplicationBridgeConfig will now be filtered based on their relevancy flags like bAlwaysRelevant.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Previously these actors were treated as always relevant regardless of their bAlwaysRelevant flag.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed error prone SetConnectionFilter API from UReplicationSystem. Use exclusion groups instead.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deleted UNopNetObjectFilter. It's been superseded by UAlwaysRelevantNetObjectFilter which has identical functionality.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated GetSubobjectsWithStableNamesForNetworking function",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "gXrR",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2535,

  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Level Design and Art Tools",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Geometry Core",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now use the fast cluster simplifier for convex decomposition's pre-pass simplifier (since the main use case is to make the decomposition faster).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry Core: Added morph target attribute as a core dynamic mesh vertex attribute.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added path intersection & difference.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a ReparameterizedCloserToWorldFrame to the GeometryCore TOrientedBox3 class.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a CreatePerVertex method to dynamic mesh overlays, as a faster alternative to the CreateFromPredicate() method in the per-vertex case.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a vertex -&gt; single triangle method to dynamic mesh, as a faster/more-convenient path (vs e.g. using a vertex-&gt;triangles iterator to get a single element).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FDynamicMesh3 queries now optionally take an inline-allocated array for local vertex-neighborhood mesh queries.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added optional scale factor to DynamicMeshUVEditor::ScaleUVAreaTo3DArea utility function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added option for geometrycore's MeshBoolean to report the source mesh of each result triangle.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added option for the Mesh Boolean to take a custom 'inside mesh' function, per mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "[GeometryCore] Delaunay 2D iterative update support.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a version of Expand() to FAxisAlignedBox3 and FAxisAlignedBox2 that takes a vector.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Segment Tree: - add option to build the tree with an array of segments - make use of the filter function that's passed in as an option.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now reset the UsedCount on a moved-from RefCountVector, so it is left in a valid state (and e.g. a mesh will not fail CheckValidity after being moved from).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the implicit morphology generator not hit an ensure() when passed an empty mesh (and still return an empty result).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the dynamic mesh color transfer method handling of non-compact meshes when biasing element positions, and simplified the lerp-toward-centroid logic used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed static mesh's LOD -&gt; dynamic mesh conversion handling of non-compact polygon group IDs",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "We need to compact these IDs so that they correspond to static mesh section indices, which all our tools and geometry script processing expect.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved performance of MeshRegionGraph operations:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Region merging transfers known neighbor information, rather than recomputing it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Less redundant validation on internal operations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Less redundant array searching when building neighbors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added api exports to the OBJMeshUtil methods so they can be called from other modules.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made MeshConvexHull's grid sampler exit when mesh bounds are empty, to avoid ensures on grid w/ zero cell size.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed dynamic mesh CompactInPlace creating a triple-sized TriangleEdges array + add coverage for this case in CheckValidity, and guard against this kind of error breaking AppendWithOffsets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now do not leave unused vertices in the cluster simplifier mesh result mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect transforms on GeometryCollectionToDynamicMesh converter, and added more comments to document the expected coordinate spaces for these meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash in implicit morphology offset operation due to offset grid dimensions overflowing int32.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a possible crash in algorithms that use the sparse solver wrapper, by properly handling failed factorizations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Geometry Script",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added various oriented box functions to geometry script, to create and query / test intersections and convert to meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an OBB containment function to geometry script (matching what simple collision fitting does, but exposing the found oriented box directly).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved geometry script's CopyCollisionMeshesFromObject support for complex collision.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It now supports any type that implements the IInterface_CollisionDataProvider interface, and specifically should now work better with Skeletal Mesh Components and Spline Mesh Components.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a 'select occluded from outside view' jacketing method to geometry script, to have more controllable occlusion operations (e.g. from specific directions, for specific material IDs/parts of mesh, w/ transparent tris).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also, cleaned up the detect exterior visibility function logic to support the new options and be a bit faster / more robust.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added target edge length QEM and cluster-based simplification methods in geometry script.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now more consistently use the term \"Connected Islands\" instead of \"Components\" when referring to connected pieces of a mesh in Geometry Script nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Filled out geometry script list conversion extract/set methods for the various list types: Scalar, UV, Vector and Color.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FOrientedBox is now exposed to Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The 'debug' pins in geometry script are now hidden in the Blueprint graph",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
```
