                  "content": "getWindowVisibleDisplayFrame returns a rectable in screen space, however, the edit box coordinates need to be provided in the main decor view's space.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "As such, translate the results of getWindowVisibleDisplayFrame to the decor view's space by translating these by the decor view's screen position.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "libGPUCounters: Android early crash fix libGPUCounters is built with statically linked libc++, exposing a bunch of std symbols, which override those in libUnreal.so.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For example, it overrides std::to_string leading to an early crash:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Other plugin calls to_string (uses libGPUCounter implementation and its operator new & memory alloc).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "That string is later destructed, using engine's operator delete.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Our allocator fatals on unrecognized pointer.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The fix is to add a linker version script to the libGPUCounters build and only expose C API related symbols as global.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Android TargetSDK Fix templates with AFS configuration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Fetch2 3.3.0 with new version of androidx.room 2.7.1 (used for background downloading).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added detection of SQL lock error on enqueue (can happen after deleteAll in Fetch2 background downloading).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added new dump_syms_comp.exe supporting compressed Symbols for Android use.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with assets with starting offset other than 0.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made MakeApk do a clean during packaging if EnableBundle is flipped between builds.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash from pending JNI exception in non-Shipping builds, when skipping over checks.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now round rather than truncate Android getRefreshRate when converting to integer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the freeze of Android Media Player playback on Xiaomi 13T or devices with a similar chipset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed TargetSDK 35 compatibility issues with background downloading.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer requests WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permission if TargetSDK doesn't support non-scoped storage.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured that keyboard dismissed isn't called when the text input is accepted by the Virtual Keyboard's done key or a physical keyboard's enter key.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, ensured that on dismissal of the virtual keyboard, text entry type is Canceled so that text committal only triggers if the widget is configured with behaviour 'Text commit on Dismiss'.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "iOS, tvOS, and iPadOS",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "IOS: Notification about network path characteristic FIOSPlatformMisc::OnNetworkConnectionCharacteristicsChanged can be used to know about network characteristic changes, e.g. knowing if a new connection is constrained or expensive.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Re-enabled SetBytes and SetBufferOffset on iOS and enable on tvOS.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for Xcode26.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The IOS rotation code now defers applying a new rotation until after we have rendered a new frame in the new orientation, for both auto-rotation and programmatic orientation selection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes the issue with a squashed aspect ratio when the user rotates the app at a time we cannot immediately render a new frame, such as during loading.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now ask for background time on iOS until all delegates called from applicationWillEnterBackground are invoked.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disallowed resolve of R32F MSAA targets as this format isn't MSAA resolvable in Metal.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, make the texture memoryless as we'll never be resolving to it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed network changed delegate for iOS.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented functionality for -MetalPSOCache=use.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deferred handling of notifications if the engine isn't ready to receive.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Occlusion Query Helpers now correct the number of frames for Metal mobile platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured valid URL for pipeline cache save location.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The current invalid URL generated was invalid as it was constructing a file URL using the absolute string of another URL as a path parameter to the constructor, causing MTLBinaryArchive-&gt;serializeToURL to crash when used.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now store webauth credentials in iOS keychain using a key that does not change after uninstalls.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed some memory leaks in the iOS web browser.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Rendering",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Architecture",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Virtual Texture:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renamed \"r.VT.Support16BitPageTable\" to \"r.VT.PageTableMode\".",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The setting can now be modified live at run time instead of being read only.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Also removed \"r.VT.SplitPhysicalPoolSize\" which now corresponds to setting \"r.VT.PageTableMode=2\".",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Unified mip color debug display for Virtual Textures.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "\"r.VT.RVT.MipColors\" is deprecated and Runtime Virtual Textures now respect \"R.VT.Borders\" which other Virtual Textures already use.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "\"r.VT.Borders\" is no longer on/off. The value now sets the debug border texel width.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Also added \"r.VT.Borders.Mip\" which isolates the mode to a single mip level.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Release/Recycle Virtual Texture spaces after they are unused for some time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "We don't release immediately to avoid cases during loading where this might trigger unnecessary Recreate/Resize work.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The old behavior was to never Release/Recycle unless we ran out of space slots.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added \"r.VT.SpaceReleaseFrames\" to control this. The default is to release after 150 frames. Setting to -1 will return to the old behavior.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Changed draw behavior for selected meshes which only write to Runtime Virtual Texture.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Previously we would fully show those meshes on selection (they are hidden in the main pass otherwise).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now we only show the selection outline.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Runtime Virtual Texture:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The display name of the \"Virtual Texture Builder\" (also sometimes previously known as \"SVT\") asset is now \"Streaming Runtime Virtual Texture\" (i.e. SRVT). This avoids confusion with Sparse Volume Texture (SVT).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It can now be created from the content browser.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevent StreamingTexture from being carried over when duplicating a RVT component (Save As, copy/paste...).  This avoids the common mistake of using another map's SRVT after a Save As.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added optional Z-increment parameter to FPixelShaderUtils::AddRasterizeToRectsPass, in order to control the Z of the quads (Z = quad index, i.e. instance id * ZIncrement). Combined with depth test enabled, this enables making the rasterization deterministic in case of overlapping quads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Runtime Virtual Texture preload requests now work for the adaptive page table case.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed programmatic RenderDoc captures randomly crashing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed non DBuffer mesh decals not obeying the mesh component \"Receive Decals\" setting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Lighting",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled VSM receiver masks for directional lights by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "~10MB memory overhead (depending on settings/scalability).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Often fairly significant performance improvements in uncached cases with lots of dynamic geometry.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled the selection of Virtual Textures on Rect Light components. These have never been supported in a cooked build, but were still shown in the Editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed Max Draw Distance and Max Distance Fade Range to Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now store and propagate \"cleared\" flags to avoid reclearing pages we never wrote into; particularly relevant for receiver mask where we treat all dynamic pages as uncached but often don't write into them all.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer allocate unnecessary receiver mask space if local light receiver masks are disabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored VSM ID allocation so that we can control the order more consistently. The immediate goal is to guarantee that directional lights get allocated first so that we can easily allocate receiver masks just for directional lights without the memory overhead of doing it for all local lights as well",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TexCreate_3DTiling flag to volume textures in TranslucentLighting to reduce memory and boost performance on some platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Marked r.UseClusteredDeferredShading and r.Mobile.UseClusteredDeferredShading as deprecated and added notification about future removal. Clustered deferred shading will be removed in a future release due to lack of utility to reduce maintenance burden.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrectly reported one pass projection overflow with megalights active. Only run VSM coarse page marking once when there are multiple views as it is view-independent.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Scale the light fade range by `GLightMaxDrawDistanceScale` to avoid lights becoming too dim at lower scales.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Lumen",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled half res integration on High scalability (r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.StochasticInterpolation 2).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This can soften normals in indirect lighting, and make GI a bit more noisy.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "On the other hand it saves ~0.5ms on console at 1080p, which feels like a right tradeoff for High scalability intended for 60hz on console.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lumen Screen Probe Gather: Bent Normal Integration improvements (r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ApplyDuringIntegration 1)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Implemented r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ScreenSpace.FoliageOcclusionStrength.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed EvaluateSHIrradiance which was causing brightening in corners.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed double AO apply during bent normal integration. Now instead of applying AO for the second time we apply only the GI approximation using AOMultiBounce, as DistantIlluminationRescale was too strong.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Clamp decoded AO as it could be larger than 1 causing too strong indirect specular occlusion.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now support ShouldApplyDuringIntegration when Screen Probe Gather Integration and Short Range AO downsample factors match.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed artifacts when ShortRangeAO is disabled, but ShouldApplyDuringIntegration is enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lumen HWRT path now supports split screen.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "R.LumenScene.DumpStats 3 will now dump primitive culling information. This is useful, as it merges instances into a single entry making it easier to read the log.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved GBuffer tile classification out into a single pass, which is also storing opaque history for the next frame. This pass is reused across Lumen and MegaLights for better performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Screen tile marking optimizations, which speed up reflections, GI, and water reflections.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Tweaked default settings:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs 0 - SWRT detail traces (mesh SDF tracing) is now a deprecated path, which won't be worked on much. For scaling quality beyond SWRT global traces it is recommended to use HWRT path instead.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaxRayIntensity 10 - firefly filtering is now more aggressive by default. This removes some interesting GI features, but also reduces noise, especially from things like small bright emissives",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed missing subsurface energy by removing extra divide by PI. Now an emissive card matches a rect light reference of the same irradiance. This bug was only affecting Epic scalability (r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.IrradianceFormat 0 path).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug on Mac platforms when running on SM5 using R11G11B10 for Typed UAV's causing rendering corruption.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix visual artifacts and out of memory reads/writes when using non power of 2 Tracing Octahedron Resolution. Now Tracing Octahedron Resolution is always clamped to valid input values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nanite Skeletal Mesh now supports bHasRayTracingRepresentation, so that those primitives can be skipped from Lumen under certain conditions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape culling stealing the r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.Allow's on changed callback. This is not needed anymore since this CVar's callback already invalidates all components, including landscape ones.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed tile artifacts on indirect specular on cloth pixels in the same tiles as hair pixels",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Don't reset temporal history on SceneTexturesExtent change. Sometimes SceneTexturesExtent can change due to inline view rendering (like water) which causes full history reset and results in visible noise on screen until things converge again.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Skip creating RGS when Lumen is disabled from the PPV volume.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Materials and Shaders",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an asset registry tag to find material instances causing shader permutations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled Virtual Texture sampling on Volume material domains.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed the interpretation of the PreSkinned Local Bounds material node when used on Instanced Static Mesh. Previously it was the bounds for the entire component. Now it is the bounds for the mesh instance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added platform cached ini value to determine whether to compile 128 bit base pass pixel shader variations on platforms which require them. These are infrequently needed and turning them off can save 50k shaders / 15 MiB at runtime r.128BitBPPSCompilation.Allow (default is true, for backwards compatibility).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved error messages reported by shader conductor to properly identify where individual error messages begin and end (and so ensure each compile error is reported on its own).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled the ZoomToFocus behavior when creating a usage node from the declaration - No longer zooms the focus of the editor since this was visually jarring for the user.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized material instance post-load in Editor builds by directly hashing the portions of shadermap ID used to construct the unique asset name, rather than constructing the full string representation then hashing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Base field to Material Parameter Collections, which can be used to derive one collection from another, with the derived collection inheriting the base's properties.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for overriding a material's parameter collections with derived collections in material instances.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Material scalar parameters can now optionally select an enumeration object to use for selecting scalar values by name in the material UI.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added default initialization of fields of FMaterialEnumerationEntry.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added function APIs to MaterialEditingLibrary to manipulate the new Enumeration material parameter.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reworked ShaderDebugData output to unify the \"worker input\" and \"direct compile\" debug mechanisms:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed r.ShaderCompiler.DebugDumpWorkerInputs cvar; always dump a valid worker input file for all jobs whenever debug info is enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved writing of this file into job completion callbacks alongside the other debug artifacts, so will be written out for cache hits if r.ShaderCompiler.DumpDebugInfoForCacheHits is true.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Modified these files to not include a copy of the compressed source, instead using the .usf artifacts.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renamed \"direct compile\" mode to \"debug compile\" and made it use this file instead of needing to serialize extra data into the debug .usf file.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed the r.DumpShaderDebugWorkerCommandLine cvar; all jobs will export a DebugCompileArgs.txt file containing the commandline that can be used to run SCW in debug compile mode by default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Modified shader pipeline compile jobs to export a single worker input file (in the first stage's debug folder).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Each stage of a pipeline will export their own DebugCompileArgs.txt (for convenience, so if only a single stage fails you can still navigate to that stage's debug folder and run the job from there).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The debug compile for any pipeline stage will run the full pipeline job (so compilation always matches what happens in the normal context) with paths modified to be relative to that specific debug folder for convenience (so when downloading debug output from another machine, only one path in the commandline needs to be fixed up to run)",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When using the Material Editing Library of functions, now always refreshes the material instance editor when changing material instance parameters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes a bug where you would set a MI parameter via a python script and the MI Editor wouldn't update the properties panel to show the newly updated value.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Automatically call UMaterialEditingLibrary::UpdateMaterialInstance() whenever a parameter on a instance is set via the library.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "UMaterialEditingLibrary::UpdateMaterialInstance should try to find any open material instance editors and tell them that the material instance has changed.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FMaterialInstanceEditor::NotifyExternalMaterialChange now calls `Refresh()` which will update the whole editor, including the property window, to properly reflect any parameter changes made by the library.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Inconsistency fixed on Comment Bubbles on Material Editor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "To ensure visual consistency new Comment bubbles created use the same color value as the other node editors, like Blueprints.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Material Editor: Added two experimental custom output nodes `Motion Vector World Offset (Per-Pixel)` and `Temporal Responsiveness` to give users a way to modify per pixel motion vectors and set how responsive the temporal history is.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Temporal Responsiveness: Describes how temporal history will be rejected for different velocity mismatch levels.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Default :0",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Medium (0,0.5]",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Full (0.5, 1.0].",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now, it will be used by TSR to change rejection heuristics. Translucency material can also use it to request higher responsiveness if depth is written (r.Velocity.TemporalResponsiveness.Supported=1) or clipped away (r.Velocity.OutputTranslucentClippedDepth.Supported=1).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The translucency mask generated improves TSR thin geometry quality.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Motion Vector World Offset (Per-Pixel): Works similar to the `Previous Frame` input of `Previous Frame Switch` but in the pixel shader. Regions with invalid velocity will be approximated with the current frame's offset.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "This function currently supports non-nanite meshes only in non-basepass velocity write and is implemented in two passes. Use r.Velocity.PixelShaderMotionVectorWorldOffset.Supported to enable it.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for customizing the file name for ShaderSymbols and ShaderTypeStats output files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed EMaterialProperty::MP_MaterialAttributes to Blueprints, Python, and the Editor UI.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This way users can use the Blueprint MaterialEditingLibrary to connect expressions to the MaterialAttributes output on the material block for materials that use MA.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a MaterialEditingLibrary function called RenameMaterialParameterGroup and RenameMaterialFunctionParameterGroup which bulk renames all the Group Names on many Material Parameters at once.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Changed LogMaterialEditingLibrary verbosity to include `Log` messages.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Simply loop over all material expressions that are parameters and if the OldGroupName matches change the name to the new one.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Call RecompileMaterial to force the material to recompile so MIs update through the editor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Unfortunately the `Group` property of material expressions is spread across many different classes. To avoid checking all the different material expression types (there are 8 different UMaterialExpression classes with their own unique Group), I've opted for a property system approach that looks for the property by name.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimize pipeline cache to reduce single allocation size and improve performance by copying less data on resize.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modified output of shader formats using DXC (DXIL output) to keep the reflection data in the DXIL container if the r.Shaders.ExtraData cvar is enabled. This is a workaround for graphics tools which cannot correctly re-generate reflection information from external PDBs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Note that this bloats runtime memory usage so should only be enabled locally if you are encountering issues seeing data formats (i.e. cbuffer layouts) in such tools.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now copy/paste material errors in the PlatformStats panel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Simply makes the text read-only \"editable\" so the user can select the text and get automatic copy/paste functionality.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Rename the aliases for the Convert node from `Make Float4` to `Make Vector4` to match \"Vector Parameter\" and \"Constant Vectors'.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This also avoids confusion with the existing Make Float 4 Engine Material functions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added additional project-specific texture groups.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Vector Parameter Expression now shows output pin display names to avoid confusion on what the first output pin is.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also fixed \"Convert to Constant\" for vector parameters. By default the outputs are now:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "RGB",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "R",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "G",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "B",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "RGBA",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Users were expecting the first output pin to be RGBA, but it was RGB.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now shows output name on pins by default for vector parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added RGBA output as the final one to match what TextureSample does.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated this behavior in the new material translator (it should really use the outputs array which is already defined).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "If no channel names are specified show R, G, B by default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer truncates and loses user data when using \"Convert to Constant\" for Vector Parameter -&gt; Constant.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gave constant 4 expression display names so the conversion code can match outputs by name when converting nodes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Marked deprecated virtual functions from MaterialInterface and FMaterial as final to avoid silent errors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Modified all derived classes to override the right functions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved IO performance of FinishPopulateShaderLibrary.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new debug artifact (ShaderTypeStats.csv), dumped by default for all cooks to the ShaderDebugInfo folder for each shader format.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This CSV file contains permutation counts/code sizes for all shaders in the shader library, grouped by shader type.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Note that this is not directly representative of final shader memory usage since it doesn't account for potential duplication of bytecode introduced by the pak chunking step (where shaders used in multiple pakfiles will have a copy in each).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is only intended to be used as a tool for tracking and comparing shader growth over time or between cooks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Subsurface Profile: Improved neighborhood validation for checkerboard when enabled, less bleeding into subsurface scattering region for low res.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Virtual Texture Pending Mips debug view now takes screen scaling into account.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UMaterialExpressionParticleSubUV::Compile bug that caused the node not to use the texture object connected to the Texture input pin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Repaired cook editor-only-data nondeterminancy in materials.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured that FDefaultMaterialInstance's CacheUniformExpression is cancelled on destroy if still pending.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Under certain conditions the FDefaultMaterialInstance could be destroyed and subsequent dispatch of CacheUniformExpression would result in a crash due to a dangling reference. This replicates functionality from FMaterialInstanceResource for which this guard is already implemented.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential out-of-bounds read when remapping shader compile diagnostic messages; could occur if there were no digits before the end of the line in the diagnostic message after the __UE_FILENAME_SENTINEL marker.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed material shader map not releasing compilation ID if shaders failed to compile.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect reporting of line numbers when compile errors are encountered in generated material code.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The code calculating the line number offset of the substituted #line directive in MaterialTemplate.ush was incorrect.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug that could cause a retry loop when running with shader development mode enabled and a preprocessing failure is encountered.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash in SafeRenameEditorOnlyData() when EditorOnlyCurrent is null.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a material derivative autogen crash when dealing with uints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash occurring when the material parent of an instance is changed through scripting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ShadingModel material expression in-node combobox to display only valid shading model entries.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made a minor fix for custom ShaderTypeStats customized name, needs to lookup cvar by ShaderFormat.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for Nanite Geometry Collections to Preskinned Local Bounds material node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where the Vulkan shader pipeline cache would sometimes incorrectly produce cache misses for shaders that had already been compiled and serialized.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed shader output for preview/transient materials being cached in DDC.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed UMaterialFunctionInterface to include the BlueprintType annotation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed incorrect application of the component scale to the output of World Space Vertex Normal node when used with skinned mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an uncommon crash in Lerp material expression when the alpha pin was connected to a non-primitive output.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MegaLights",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented MegaLights-driven VSM marking to only mark VSM pages that MegaLights has selected samples for.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the r.MegaLights.DownsampleCheckerboard, which can run sampling/tracing at half res (every other pixel). It's a good middle ground between default quarter res sampling and option full resolution sampling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed r.MegaLights.HardwareRayTracing.ForceTwoSided, which allows to flip between matching raster behavior and forcing two-sided on all geometries in order to speedup tracing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now always vectorize shading samples. This saves on average 0.1-0.2ms in complex content on current gen consoles.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved spatial denoiser filtering after disocclusion.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Limited number of samples sent towards the directional lights to a specified fraction (r.MegaLights.DirectionalLightSampleFraction). This helps with noise indoors, where there's a strong directional light inside taking over the entire sampling budget.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now uses downsampled neighborhood for temporal accumulation. Interpolated pixels don't add much to neighborhood stats, so we can skip them, improving quality by effectively using a wider neighborhood filter. This also improves performance of the temporal accumulation pass, as it now can load less data into LDS.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now properly handle invalid sample upsampling. Sometimes during upsampling we can't find any valid sample and need to fallback to history (without any neighborhood clamp). This makes lighting on highly detailed or thin geometry a bit sharper and a bit more stable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled guiding tile filtering and added stochastic bilinear sampling of guiding tiles in order to hide tile artifacts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now merge identical rays in order to avoid overhead of duplicated traces. Duplicated rays happen with strong point lights, where we may send a few identical rays to the same light doing unnecessary work.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added screen space trace for hair (r.MegaLights.Hair.ScreenTraces). Screen space traces improve card hair quality compared to approximate RT fallback mesh, but can be noisy. In order to reduce the noise there's now extra hair only screen space trace bias (r.MegaLights.Hair.ScreenTraces.Bias).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Merged downsample factor / checkboard CVars into a single r.MegaLights.DownsampleMode CVar.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now require ray tracing platform support, in order to skip compiling and cooking MegaLights shaders on certain platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed split screen crash due to out of bounds memory reads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
